allow: PowerShell(where.exe node 2>&1; where.exe npm 2>&1; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://nodejs.org/dist/index.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | Out-File "$env:TEMP\\node-index.json"; \(Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\node-index.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\) | Where-Object { $_.lts -ne $false } | Select-Object -First 3 version, lts)
